data.body: B1 part 1 (the behaviour-preserving live-gate extraction, design doc D2) DONE on branch feat/production-batch-runner @ 68cc69ce: extracted the Pass-1 finder machinery from orchestrator.py into a new plan_review/pass1.py (run_pass1 + CONTAINER_CRITERIA/_ticket_size/_ticket_graph_blob/_linked_session_log/_run_container/material_fingerprint), with orchestrator._run_passes now calling run_pass1 and keeping too_big/shed routing + Pass-2 + Pass-3 unchanged. material_fingerprint re-exported from orchestrator for attest.py/__init__.py. No cycle; orchestrator 743->491 LOC, pass1.py 313. Verified: 106 plan-review tests identical green before/after; make lint clean; module-size clean; code-review subagent confirmed byte-for-byte behaviour-preserving (zero-diff run_pass1 body + _run_passes remainder). Full suite running; PR next. B1 part 2 (the ProductionBatchRunner over run_pass1 + assemble_context/route_criteria) follows.
